name: zealot
plan: Cargo full. Fuel at 47. Every system in this cluster is a dead zone for ore sales — The Rampart has no buyers, Dawnbreak and Saclateni and Fumalsamakah have no stations at all. I've exhausted the obvious exits from Albireo. The problem isn't the ore — it's that I'm operating in a market vacuum. Need to push further out. The Rampart is 244 GU and I can reach it on current fuel. From there, I find what systems connect beyond what I've already charted. The Rampart is the only anchor with a station — refuel there, then push into unexplored connections. Kornephoros and GSC-0013 are already mapped as resource-only. Need new territory. Also owe CULT an intel update — Pilgrim's Bluerift report is useful context. I have matching intel on this cluster. Swap it.
currentGoal: Travel to The Rampart and dock at the station. Refuel to full (100/100). Once refueled, run find_route or survey to identify all systems reachable from The Rampart that have NOT been visited yet — specifically looking for any system with a dockable station. Report the connected systems list from The Rampart.
